name: vibe-check
description: Anti-vibe-coding mentor. When AI writes code for you, Vibe Check turns it into a Duolingo-style quiz so you actually understand it.

commands.title: Vibe Check: Quiz Me On Selection

vibeCheck.autoQuiz.description: Automatically generate a quiz when the Pulse Observer detects a large AI insertion. Turn off to be prompted before each quiz.

enumDescriptions: Auto: prefer Antigravity if hosted there, else Copilot, else any direct provider with a saved key.
VS Code language model API (requires GitHub Copilot subscription).
Antigravity built-in AI (only inside the Antigravity host).
Anthropic Claude direct (set key via 'Vibe Check: Set API Key...').
Google Gemini direct (set key via 'Vibe Check: Set API Key...').
OpenAI direct (set key via 'Vibe Check: Set API Key...').
OpenRouter aggregator, ~100+ models behind one key (set key via 'Vibe Check: Set API Key...').
vibeCheck.modelProvider.markdownDescription: Which LLM backend Vibe Check uses. API keys for direct providers live in encrypted SecretStorage — set them with **`Vibe Check: Set API Key...`**. Pick a model with **`Vibe Check: Select Model...`**.

vibeCheck.copilotModel.markdownDescription: **Copilot** family override (e.g. `gpt-4o`, `claude-3.5-sonnet`). Leave empty to use the default. Pick interactively with **`Vibe Check: Select Model...`**.

vibeCheck.antigravityModel.markdownDescription: **Antigravity** model override (e.g. `gemini-3-flash`). Leave empty to use the default.

vibeCheck.anthropicModel.markdownDescription: **Anthropic** model id (e.g. `claude-sonnet-4-6`, `claude-opus-4-7`). Leave empty for default. Get a key at [console.anthropic.com/settings/keys](https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys), then run **`Vibe Check: Set API Key...`**.

vibeCheck.geminiModel.markdownDescription: **Gemini** model id (e.g. `gemini-3-flash-preview`, `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`, `gemini-2.5-flash`). Leave empty for default. Get a key at [aistudio.google.com/app/apikey](https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey), then run **`Vibe Check: Set API Key...`**.

vibeCheck.openaiModel.markdownDescription: **OpenAI** model id (e.g. `gpt-5.5`, `gpt-5.4-mini`, `gpt-4o`). Leave empty for default. Get a key at [platform.openai.com/api-keys](https://platform.openai.com/api-keys), then run **`Vibe Check: Set API Key...`**.

vibeCheck.openrouterModel.markdownDescription: **OpenRouter** model id (e.g. `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6`, browse the [model catalog](https://openrouter.ai/models)). Leave empty for default. Get a key at [openrouter.ai/keys](https://openrouter.ai/keys), then run **`Vibe Check: Set API Key...`**.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
